prompt:
A striking typographic portrait of a young woman with a thoughtful, three-quarters gaze, completely rendered using a text-mosaic and word-cloud effect. Her skin, hair, and clothing are entirely formed by varied typographic fonts, headlines, and individual words of different sizes, orientations, and weights (such as {argument name="keywords" default="\"ENERGY\", \"BILLS\", \"MONEY\", \"SCHOOL\", \"SUCCESS\""}). Bold, prominent serif and sans-serif typography defines the heavy contours of her neck, shoulder, and jawline, while finer, delicate cursive and micro-text fill in the subtle highlights and midtones of her facial features. Her lips are a distinct, vibrant red, also composed of textured typographic text. The edges of her hair and torso gently dissolve into a chaotic, fragmented spray of letters and ink splatters. The entire subject is set against a clean, stark white background layered with faint, faded horizontal lines of vintage handwritten script and blurred newspaper print, creating a layered multimedia collage effect. High contrast, sharp detail, artistic graphic design style.

Aspect ratio is 9:16
